abandonedReason: Superseded by 0754-studio-search-502-cdn-loopback (deployed 158fae83, production restored). Both increments diagnosed the same root cause and converged on the same fix (in-process direct call to upstream route). 0753's cleaner approach (extracting a shared run-skills-search.ts lib) is a desirable future refactor but not blocking — 0754's inline import works, all tests pass, 502 is gone.
